name: kimiqb
description: KimiQB packages a vibecoding-first Kimi Code planning workflow with project comprehension, evidence traceability, ontology, Ledger v2 continuity, and gated implementation handoffs.
author: Alican Kiraz

interface.shortDescription: Gate-aware planning workflow for Kimi Code
interface.longDescription: KimiQB helps Kimi Code inspect a repository, ask repo-aware intake questions, create a master project plan, autopsy existing project state, preserve project comprehension, ontology, and Ledger v2 continuity, decompose the plan into phase-level sub-plans, audit evidence traceability and readiness, then print canonical gated handoffs when the audit allows implementation.
